title: The Public Sector Iron and Steel Companies (Restructuring) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1978
full_text: The Public Sector Iron and Steel Companies (Restructuring) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1978 पब्‍लिक सेक्‍टर लोहा और इस्‍पात कंपनी (पुनर्संरचना) तथा प्रकीर्ण उपबंध अधिनियम,1978 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197816 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1978-04-30 Act Year: 1978 Short Title: The Public Sector Iron and Steel Companies (Restructuring) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1978 Hindi Title: पब्‍लिक सेक्‍टर लोहा और इस्‍पात कंपनी (पुनर्संरचना) तथा प्रकीर्ण उपबंध अधिनियम,1978 Long Title: An Act to provide for restructuring of the iron and steel companies in the public sector so as to secure better management and greater efficiency in their working and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Steel Enforcement Date: 01-05-1978 Notification: 1st May, 1978, vide notification No. S.O. 291(E), dated 30th April, 1978, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Public Sector Iron and Steel Companies (Restructuring) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1978 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II DISSOLUTION, TRANSFER AND VESTING OF UNDERTAKINGS OF CERTAIN COMPANIES CHAPTER III TRANSFER OF SHARES CHAPTER IV PROVISIONS RELATING TO OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES CHAPTER V FINANCIAL PROVISIONS CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. “Undertaking”— meaning of. Section 4. Dissolution, transfer and vesting of undertakings of certain companies in Integral Company. Section 5. Transfer and vesting of Kiriburu Iron Ore Mines, etc., in Integral Company. Section 6. Transfer and vesting of Refractory Plant, etc., in the Bharat Refractories Limited. Section 7. Transfer of immovable properties of Hindustan Steel Limited to Metallurgical and Engineering Consultants (India) Limited. Section 8. Transfer of shares held by Bokaro Steel Limited to Central Government. Section 9. Transfer of shares held by Integral Company to Central Government. Section 10. Transfer of shares held by Integral Company to Bharat Refractories Limited. Section 11. Transfer of shares held by Central Government to Integral Company. Section 12. Central Government, etc., deemed to be registered in the register of members of companies. Section 13. Power of Central Government to modify amount of paid-up share capital of Integral Company, etc., and issue of shares. Section 14. Provisions relating to officers and other employees of dissolved companies. Section 15. Provisions relating to officers and employees of transferred units. Section 16. Provisions relating to directors. Section 17. Provision relating to auditors. Section 18. Compensation for transfer not payable. Section 19. Provident Fund. Section 20. Gratuity, welfare and other funds. Section 21. Provisions with respect to income-tax and surtax. Section 22. Taxes, fees and other charges not payable. Section 23. Saving of contracts, etc. Section 24. Saving of legal proceedings. Section 25. Power to remove difficulties. Section 26. Act to override the provisions of other laws. Section 27. Power to amend memorandum and articles of association. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
